methodology.paymentSources: Instamojo credit CSV plus PayU captured rows plus Cashfree rows retained after removing Cashfree records marked as Instamojo backend duplicates.
methodology.weekDefinition: Monday 00:00:00 IST to Sunday 23:59:59 IST, matched to the selected webinar's week.
methodology.attendeeMatchOrder: Email, then phone last 10 digits. Name matching is not used.
methodology.attendanceTime: Uses the existing Zoom report totalPresentSeconds, which sums actual join segments instead of first-join-to-last-drop span.
